headline: Anthropic Launches Wealth Management Plugins — LPL and Orion Deploy Claude to 30,000+ Advisors
summary: Anthropic has released purpose-built Claude plugins for wealth management, designed to let broker-dealers, RIAs, custodians, and TAMPs build private, compliance-controlled AI tools powered by their own data. LPL Financial is deploying these across its 30,000+ advisor network, while Orion Advisor Technology simultaneously announced integration into its Denali AI platform for meeting prep, client reviews, proposal generation, and rebalancing workflows (InvestmentNews, Feb 24, 2026). Peter Nolan, Anthropic's Head of Asset and Wealth Management, stated: 'They own what they build. We are providing the building blocks, while the experts build on top' (WealthManagement.com). LPL described the partnership as delivering on its 'roadmap of industry-leading capabilities for financial advisors and institutions.' The dual announcement came two weeks after LPL's stock closed 8% lower on February 10, the same day Altruist launched its Hazel AI platform (CNBC). LPL also uses AI from Jump, Microsoft Copilot, FactSet, Adobe, Box, and FMG Mobile.
the_so_what: Anthropic's horizontal plugin strategy — shipping to LPL and Orion simultaneously — signals it is positioning as infrastructure across the independent channel rather than going exclusive with any single distributor. This gives LPL building blocks but not a finished product: Altruist's Hazel is already a deployed, vertically integrated platform with live custodial data and tax planning embedded natively. Any firm evaluating LPL's AI platform commitment should ask how quickly LPL converts plugin architecture into end-to-end advisor workflows, because Anthropic's simultaneous Orion deal means the tooling itself is not a differentiator.

key_stat.label: financial advisors in LPL's network receiving Anthropic Claude plugin deployment (LPL announcement, Feb 2026)

capability_evidence.evidence: LPL expanded Anthropic partnership to deploy compliance-controlled Claude AI plugins across its 30,000+ advisor network. Orion integrating into Denali AI platform simultaneously. No specific LPL product named beyond plugin architecture.

people: Peter Nolan — Head of Asset and Wealth Management, Anthropic

landscape_context.peer_comparison: Altruist Hazel (deployed, integrated), Orion Denali AI (deploying same Anthropic plugins)

_research.whats_new: Anthropic horizontal wealth strategy revealed. Plugin architecture (not finished product). Peter Nolan named as Head of AWM. Orion simultaneous announcement. LPL stock context.
